name: Vertebroplasty
description: Percutaneous vertebroplasty for vertebral compression fracture

findings.technique: Percutaneous vertebroplasty was performed under CT/fluoroscopic guidance.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Cement Placement
sections.content: Bone cement [successfully injected / adequate fill / no leak].

sections.name: Complications
sections.content: No cement leakage into spinal canal or veins. No infection.

impression:
1. Successful vertebroplasty performed.
2. Good cement distribution achieved.
